Bootstrapping a niche SaaS to $3k MRR in 6 months
@founder_one main May 18

Solo bootstrapper here. Sharing the unglamorous middle of the journey — no rocketship growth, just steady compounding.

Things that broke immediately after launch (and what I wish I'd built)
@shipper_two main May 18

Onboarding is fine. Cancellation is fine. Everything in the middle — proration, dunning, refunds — was an absolute nightmare.

I wish someone built a self-hosted alternative to Linear that wasn't a Jira fork
@commenter_three main May 18

Plain markdown issues plus a kanban view. That's the whole spec.
